message:
beads: enrich Phase 3 beads with disclosure and packing systems

- meta_skill-sqh: Complete disclosure levels (Minimal→Complete),
  token budgets, context-aware disclosure logic
- meta_skill-0an: Micro-slicing engine with SliceType enum,
  SkillSliceIndex, slicing pipeline, conditional predicates
- meta_skill-9ik: Token packer with constrained optimization,
  PackConstraints, mandatory slices, pack modes, coverage quotas
- meta_skill-o8o: Context-aware suggestions with Suggester,
  signals, trigger boost, swarm planning, explainability
- meta_skill-7va: ms load command with dependency handling,
  pack modes, load pipeline, robot output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
